text.message: I just cried... i wanted that spot
think there is a lot of good spots
Im kinda happy with my spot
Dont know what ill get for next settlement
greens spot is going to be great
it was gonna be great no matter what
I mean, lets see what they do, but i'll explain my logic after
probably should have taken the ore away from them
I was gonna plow red, but i wanna start things off well
red you need wheat my dude
happy to trade you straight away if you dont go 5 4 11
I'm gonna need ore wood and brick
I'll help for a future favor
I can give brick and whea
just dont trade wheat to red
green is a the biggest threat btw
Red, I think you're second likely to win, but green is gonna cook us all
You gotta stop green from getting to 4
its green... they're just gonna win
i'll do it if you help me with wood
im in last green why rob from me?
Red, I think green takes the wheat port and we loose
Can trade wood for sheep and hay
Need this to take the port
Green is also the best elo... sometimes its just luck...
you should have placed the the 8 5 10 blue
if either of yall need wheat port service lmk.
should have placed on the 4 11 red
you dont even need that spot man
should have pointed towards the 8 wheat
just bad for both of us
black, I can try trade some roads
okay, wheat rolling is the death
black do you want port service
do you get what im saying tho red?
you need wheat man, you stuffed us both up by going that way
11 cards and it aint a problem
imagine if green settled on the port
this doesnt help me at all red
I dont so much , i just dont have  that number
okay, i'll try give out some wheat
I know, but we can try
black, you should try take army
and I can help red get devs
red, I think its the 8 ore
if you can build any roads

nah, green just stole a wood from me
